prompt:
Here's a diff for a new authentication feature:

New files:
- app/auth/login.tsx (login form with email/password, form validation)
- app/auth/useAuth.ts (session management hook)
- app/auth/ProtectedRoute.tsx (route wrapper for auth check)
- tests/auth.spec.ts (9 E2E tests covering: unauthenticated redirect, login form behavior, successful login, sign-out, session persistence)

Changes:
- Login page with two-panel layout (form on left, marketing content on right)
- Submit button disabled until both email and password are filled
- Inline error messages without layout shift
- Session persists across page reloads and browser tabs
- Sign-out invalidates session server-side
- Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to /login
- Authenticated users are redirected away from /login
- Profile button in dashboard shows signed-in user's name

Please generate a PR description for this.
expected_elements: testing section with E2E test count

prompt:
Here's a diff for a performance bug fix:

Modified files:
- app/components/DataTable.tsx (changed from re-rendering entire table on cell change to only updating affected row)
- app/hooks/useTableData.ts (memoized cell update logic)

Test changes:
- Added 3 performance benchmarks in tests/performance.spec.ts
- Existing unit tests still pass

The fix addresses the issue where tables with 1000+ rows were re-rendering completely on any cell update, causing 2-3 second delays. Now only the affected row re-renders, reducing delay to <100ms.

Please generate a PR description.
expected_elements: deliverables focused on what the user experiences (speed)
